info.title: Google Ads Custom Connector
info.description: Power Automate Custom Connector for Google Ads API. Executes GAQL (Google Ads Query Language) queries against a single search endpoint. Monitoring logic (COST_ZERO, BUDGET_OVERSPEND, CTR_FLUCTUATION, SEM_HIGH_CPA) is handled by the Power Automate Flow.

scopes.https://www.googleapis.com/auth/adwords: Manage and view your Google Ads campaigns

post.description: Execute a GAQL (Google Ads Query Language) query against the Google Ads API. The query determines what data is returned — campaigns, ad groups, keywords, or metrics. Used by the monitoring flow to check COST_ZERO, BUDGET_OVERSPEND, CTR_FLUCTUATION, and SEM_HIGH_CPA conditions.

parameters.name: customerId
parameters.description: Google Ads Customer ID (10-digit, without dashes)

parameters.name: login-customer-id
parameters.description: MCC (Manager) Account ID — required when accessing client accounts via MCC

query.description: GAQL query string. Determines what data is returned. Example: SELECT campaign.id, metrics.cost_micros FROM campaign WHERE segments.date DURING YESTERDAY

200.description: Query executed successfully. Results vary based on the GAQL query fields.

400.description: Invalid GAQL query syntax or unsupported fields

403.description: Insufficient permissions or invalid Developer Token

404.description: Customer ID not found — occurs when using a test Developer Token to query a real (non-test) account

GoogleAdsSearchResponse.description: Response from Google Ads search query. Fields present depend on what was requested in the GAQL query.

results.description: Array of result rows matching the GAQL query

campaign.description: Campaign-level fields (present when campaign fields are in SELECT)

adGroup.description: Ad group-level fields (present when ad_group fields are in SELECT)

adGroupCriterion.description: Keyword-level fields (present when ad_group_criterion fields are in SELECT)

metrics.description: Performance metrics (present when metrics fields are in SELECT)

costMicros.description: Cost in micros (divide by 1,000,000 for actual currency value)

segments.description: Segmentation fields (present when segments fields are in SELECT)

fieldMask.description: Comma-separated list of fields returned in this response

requestId.description: Unique identifier for this API request (use for debugging)
